name: Siege Scepter
description: Notes Part of the Agents of Oryx Abilities.
effects: Mad God’s Wrath: On user’s current position, release a nova of dazing 200 damage shots across 4.5 tiles Shots: 24 (arc gap: 15°) Nova Total Damage: 4800 Projectile Speed: 10 tiles/second Nova Effect: Inflicts Dazed on enemies for 3 seconds Nova Cooldown: 8 seconds
